programme.title: Breakfast with Vantage Music
programme.desc: Get ready for your day with Vantage Music

programme.title: It's The 80's
programme.desc: The start of the music video era, with 80's classics not to be forgotten as well as some you probably have forgotten (for good reason!).

programme.title: The 90's
programme.desc: Britpop, Jamming basslines, Catchy pop, forgotten boy bands with a bit of hip hop. It's the 90's baby.

programme.title: Ultimate 2000's
programme.desc: A mix of the hits of 2000's along with some more lesser known artists.

programme.title: European Top 20
programme.desc: A rundown of the top playing hits across the EU, compiled by our partners at top40-charts.com

programme.title: Video Mix
programme.desc: A mix of today's hits, with the classics you remember

programme.title: Vantage Rocks
programme.desc: The best rock hits from the past to today.

programme.title: Dance With Vantage
programme.desc: One hour of non-stop dance to end your work day.

programme.title: Video Mix
programme.desc: A mix of today's hits, with the classics you remember

programme.desc: A mix of the hits of 2000's along with some more lesser known artists.

programme.title: Clubzone
programme.desc: Two hours of club music to get your night going

programme.title: Partyzone
programme.desc: Party all night long with two hours of new and old dance, electronic and trance

programme.title: Chillout Zone
programme.desc: It's time to relax, cop out, and chill with the chillout zone

programme.title: Night Videos
programme.desc: Night Videos but it's probably also some chillout zone cuz it's great let's be real
